sources.notes: FDSNWS earthquake event query bounded to the Serbian landmass bbox. Returns recent events (magnitude, depth, time, location). Confirmed HTTP 200, content-type application/json. Fallback for the Republic Seismological Survey of Serbia.

sources.authority: Meteoalarm (via RHMZ — Republic Hydrometeorological Service of Serbia)
sources.notes: Meteoalarm machine-readable per-country warnings feed for Serbia, sourced from RHMZ (hidmet.gov.rs). CAP-derived JSON with EMMA_ID area codes and color-coded alert levels for wind, rain, thunderstorm, heat, snow/ice, etc. Confirmed HTTP 200, content-type application/json; charset=utf-8.

Open-Meteo Flood API exposing GloFAS ensemble river-discharge forecasts, sampled at Belgrade / the Danube–Sava confluence. Keyless flood-risk signal for Serbian river basins. Confirmed HTTP 200, content-type application/json; charset=utf-8.

sources.authority: EFFIS — European Forest Fire Information System (Copernicus / JRC)
sources.notes: EFFIS OGC WMS covering pan-European fire danger forecast, MODIS/VIIRS active fires and burnt areas — includes Serbia. GetCapabilities lists layers for map-overlay integration. Confirmed HTTP 200, content-type application/vnd.ogc.wms_xml (OGC XML).

Energy-Charts public API exposing Serbian electricity day-ahead prices and market data (CC BY 4.0). No API key required. Confirmed HTTP 200, content-type application/json (rate-limited; retry on HTTP 429).
Open-Meteo air-quality API (CAMS) sampled at Belgrade: PM10, PM2.5 and European AQI. Keyless ambient air-pollution signal for Serbia. Confirmed HTTP 200, content-type application/json; charset=utf-8.

sources.authority: GDACS — Global Disaster Alert and Coordination System (UN/EC)
sources.notes: GDACS multi-hazard event list (floods, earthquakes, wildfires, cyclones) as GeoJSON; filter by country=Serbia in the feature properties. Confirmed HTTP 200, content-type application/json; charset=utf-8.
